title: Senior AI Engineer for AI Singapore (Products) - Assistant Senior Manager
description:
Duties & Responsibilities

  • Lead technical design and implementation for complex engineering problems
  • Own end-to-end delivery of key features or systems within Hub, Platform, or Spokes
  • Mentor and coach AI Engineers; conduct code reviews and pairing sessions
  • Drive engineering standards adoption: CI/CD, testing, reliability, SDK conventions
  • Coordinate with Product and Research to translate requirements into technical solutions
  • Identify and resolve technical debt; propose architectural improvements
  • May lead smaller teams or initiatives when needed

Accountable for: Technical leadership and delivery within a squad or cross-functional initiative

Requirements

  • 7+ years of industry experience in the field of data science, machine learning and AI
  • BS in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent industry experience)
  • Experience in technical documentation, including writing and maintaining documentation for complex software systems or AI projects.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams and engage with diverse communities.
  • Solid community engagement portfolios, such as impactful open-source initiative leadership and regular involvement in tech community-driven events
  • 5+ years involvement in end-to-end prototyping, deployment and operationalisation of machine learning products in private/public sectors
  • Technical leadership experience is highly favoured
  • Deep expertise in ML systems, infrastructure, or software engineering
  • Track record of shipping production systems at scale
  • Strong communication skills; ability to work across disciplines
  • Experience mentoring junior engineers

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
A research-intensive public university, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore (NTU Singapore) has 33,000 undergraduate and postgraduate students in the Engineering, Business, Science, Humanities, Arts, & Social Sciences, and Graduate colleges. It also has a medical school, the Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine, established jointly with Imperial College London.


NTU is also home to world-class autonomous institutes – the National Institute of Education, S Rajaratnam School of International Studies, Earth Observatory of Singapore, and Singapore Centre for Environmental Life Sciences Engineering – and various leading research centres such as the Nanyang Environment & Water Research Institute (NEWRI) and Energy Research Institute @ NTU (ERI@N).


Ranked amongst the world’s top universities by QS, NTU has also been named the world’s top young university for the past seven years. The University’s main campus is frequently listed among the Top 15 most beautiful university campuses in the world and has 57 Green Mark-certified (equivalent to LEED-certified) buildings, of which 95% are certified Green Mark Platinum. Apart from its main campus, NTU also has a campus in Novena, Singapore’s healthcare district.


Under the NTU Smart Campus vision, the University harnesses the power of digital technology and tech-enabled solutions to support better learning and living experiences, the discovery of new knowledge, and the sustainability of resources.


For more information, visit www.ntu.edu.sg
postedCompany.name: NANYANG TECHNOLOGICAL UNIVERSITY
